mapper.select: SELECT fl.ID, fl.NAME, fl.URL, fl.LOGO, fl.DESCRIPTION, fl.EMAIL, fl.CONTACT, fl.STATUS, fl.IS_VISIBLE, fl.ALLOW_FOLLOW, fl.SORT, fl.CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_TIME, (SELECT u.USERNAME FROM user u WHERE u.ID = fl.CREATE_USER) AS CREATE_USERNAME, (SELECT u.USERNAME FROM user u WHERE u.ID = fl.UPDATE_USER) AS UPDATE_USERNAME FROM friend_link fl WHERE fl.ID = #{friendLinkId}
